invite.heading: Invitation to {{orgName}}
invite.passwordHint: At least 12 characters, one letter and one digit.
invite.invalidHint: If you think this is a mistake, ask your administrator for a new link.
invite.notFoundMessage: The invitation doesn't exist or is invalid.

errors.invitation_email_mismatch: The invitation was issued for a different email than the one you logged in with.
errors.invitation_expired: This invitation has expired. Ask your administrator for a new one.
errors.invitation_consumed: This invitation has already been used.
errors.user_already_in_organization: This email already belongs to another organization. Use a different account, or leave your current organization first.
errors.weak_password: Password doesn't meet the requirements (at least 12 characters, a letter + a digit).
errors.generic: Accepting the invitation failed. Please try again.

createOrg.heading: Create your organization
createOrg.inviteHint: Invited by colleagues? Use the link that came in your email instead of creating a new organization.

errors.seatRange: Number of users must be between 1 and 500.

nameStep.intro: Start with a name. Company details can be filled in anytime later.
nameStep.label: Organization name

seatsStep.intro: How many salespeople will use SimpleCRM? You can change this anytime later in Settings.
seatsStep.label: Number of salespeople
seatsStep.hint: This value acts as the invite limit and drives the resulting billing.
seatsStep.hint2: We bill only after the 30-day trial ends. You'll choose the price in the next step.

planStep.dueDatePrefix: Before the trial ends we'll send you an invoice due on the day the trial ends (
planStep.dueDateSuffix: ). You can pay by card or bank transfer.
planStep.statusPrefix: You'll find the payment status and further documents anytime in
